messages.not_analyzed: Run a manual analysis to unlock the canonical historical state later. Recent provider data remains available now.
messages.queued: Analysis has been queued. Recent Overview remains available while the run starts.
messages.running: Analysis is running. Recent Overview remains visible while progress updates arrive.
messages.ready: Analysis metadata is up to date for this wallet.
messages.stale: The last successful analysis is older than seven days. Start a fresh run when you need current reconstructed history.
messages.failed: The last analysis run failed. You can retry without losing the recent Overview data already on screen.

fallback.recentViewAvailable: Recent provider data is still available while analysis is unavailable.
